title: The Lost Woods
description: This datapack adds the lost woods from zelda, with poisonous water and deku scrubs! No resource pack required
body:
# The Lost Woods

The Lost Woods is a wood that appear in the Zelda series.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CqsxpJrlt9A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Biome features

- Poisonous water
- Narrow forest
- Custom soundtrack in the mod version
- Torchflowers grow naturally there, you don't need a sniffer if you are in this biome
- Fairies
- Fog
- Green light color for light sources

## Enemies spawning in the biome

- Bogged
- Witches
- Deku Scrubs


## Deku Scrubs features

![Deku Scrub](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vpJduxWZ/images/8c162af0c166dc113c30cbe3d42664bb5e9bf9d4.png)

- Only attacks when attacked
- Loot jungle leaves
- Has a 3D model
- Can rotate but can't move out of his position
- Appears in the lost woods and in swamps

**The deku scrubs naturally despawn to optimize performance, but if you want to summon a persistent deku scrub, you can do /function sacred_grove:summon_deku_scrub_persistent**


### Preview


<details>
<summary>Click to reveal</summary>

![The Lost Woods preview](https://i.imgur.com/Uhcxc1h.gif)

</details>

Depending on the variant of the mod/datapack, the biome will generate naturally, usually next to forests.
It can also be generated in single biome worlds.
